title: Satellite View No Longer Available?
excerpt: Is anyone else experiencing that when a new map view is added to a board, the satellite view is no longer available?  My older maps still have satellite available, but newly added maps do not.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Is anyone else experiencing that when a new map view is added to a board, the satellite view is no longer available? My older maps still have satellite available, but newly added maps do not.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Usernamegame,

Just to clarify, the satellite option is no longer available for you?

Screen Shot 2023-05-31 at 2.10.32 pm1568×610 90.1 KB

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. I am also working with the Tech Team on the issue but there has been no fix yet.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry to hear this Jake! You’re welcome to share your email with us via private message so we can take a look at the status of this request?

posts.author: CWrightSL (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also experiencing the same problem. When I create a map view from a board there is no satellite view option.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

It’s unfortunate that the satellite mode is not available anymore on the default Map Widget.

At Tryve, we encountered many more limitations of the default Map Widget so we created our own, called Map View Pro. It doesn’t only add the satellite option back but it also allows you to customize how pins are being displayed on the map (fe.: color them based on a status value) and choose what information is displayed when you click a pin.

You can try it for free for 14 days here, if you’re missing anything, do let us know!

Best,

Maarten
